description: Fix panel version showing 'vdev': fetch version from /api/health endpoint and pass to sidebar. Fix i18n: add nav group titles (Overview/Manage/System) to translations. Fix RTL: ensure proper RTL CSS handling for sidebar and all components when FA is selected.
steps: 1. In panel/web/admin/src/layouts/AppShell.vue: Add an onMounted fetch to GET /api/health, extract version from response, store in a ref, and pass as :version prop to TheSidebar. The /api/health endpoint returns JSON with a 'version' field. Fallback to VERSION file content or 'dev' if fetch fails.

2. In panel/web/admin/src/components/TheSidebar.vue: Replace hardcoded nav group titles ('Overview', 'Manage', 'System') with t() calls: t('nav.group_overview'), t('nav.group_manage'), t('nav.group_system').

3. In panel/web/admin/src/i18n.ts: Add keys 'nav.group_overview', 'nav.group_manage', 'nav.group_system' for all three locales (en: Overview/Manage/System, fa: proper Persian translations, zh: proper Chinese translations).

4. In panel/web/admin/src/style.css: Review and enhance the existing [dir='rtl'] rules. The RTL rules exist already but need completion: add rules for .portal-nav__links, .topbar-left, .form-grid, .form-actions, .protocol-card__controls margin, .bulk-toolbar, .search-bar. Ensure the grid layout flips properly with dir=rtl.

5. In panel/web/admin/src/components/TheSidebar.vue: Add scoped RTL styles so that in RTL mode, the collapse-btn moves to left instead of right, nav-item flex-direction stays row but text alignment adjusts, and sidebar-foot items align properly.
6. Verify useI18n.ts already applies dir='rtl' on <html> when locale is 'fa' (it does via applyDirection function) - no changes needed there.
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar shows actual version from API (e.g., v1.0.0) not vdev
Nav group titles are translated when locale changes to FA or ZH
When FA locale is selected, document gets dir=rtl and layout flips correctly
RTL mode: sidebar appears on right, text is right-aligned, form layouts flip
findings: All verification passed: vue-tsc --noEmit clean, vite build succeeds, vitest run passes (7 admin tests + 25 shared tests). Version fetch uses relative URL /api/health for reverse proxy compatibility. RTL scoped styles use :global() selector in TheSidebar to target [dir=rtl] from scoped context. All changes are backward-compatible (additive i18n keys, graceful fetch fallback).
